title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A video exploring how logarithmic transformations of complex numbers can reveal hidden structure in Escher's Print Gallery. The presentation demonstrates conformal maps and complex exponentials as tools for understanding recursive patterns in visual art through mathematical analysis.
